dict.string: ClaraBridge needs Reminders access to read and manage reminder items through MCP tools.
ClaraBridge needs Calendar access to read and manage events through MCP tools.
ClaraBridge needs Reminders access to read and manage reminder items through MCP tools.
ClaraBridge needs Calendar access to read and manage events through MCP tools.
ClaraBridge may automate local macOS capabilities requested through MCP tools.
